news.t: Pacer ETFs Expands Free Cash Flow Aristocrats Lineup with Launch of Mid-Cap and Small-Cap Quality Strategies: MCOW and SCOW

holdings.infoBox: SCOW is an equity ETF with a total of 82 individual holdings. The top holdings are Corcept Therapeutics stock at 4.74%, Jackson Financial at 4.65%, Etsy, Inc. at 4.48%, Enova International at 3.71%, and Match Group at 3.70%.

overview.description: The Pacer S&P SmallCap 600 Quality FCF Aristocrats ETF (SCOW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is passively managed, seeking to provide exposure to the smallest companies in the US with consistent positive cash flow-based financial strength. SCOW was launched on Aug 27, 2025 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: S&P SmallCap 600 Quality FCF Aristocrats Index

data.title: Pacer ETFs Expands Free Cash Flow Aristocrats Lineup with Launch of Mid-Cap and Small-Cap Quality Strategies: MCOW and SCOW
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pacer ETFs Expands Free Cash Flow Aristocrats Lineup with Launch of Mid-Cap and Small-Cap Quality Strategies: MCOW and SCOW.
